key_predictive_features.description: Currently ~50 (compressed from 105 in April 2025). ML-filtered mean reversion on GSR outperforms static stat arb by 20% drawdown reduction. Sharpe 0.68-0.73 with 1.5 sigma thresholds and 5-day holding periods. Dynamic hedge ratio fluctuates 1.2-1.6. Historical mean 50-70; below 50 is historically rare and signals silver overextension.
key_predictive_features.our_coverage: metals_cross_asset.py tracks G/S ratio velocity but doesn't implement mean-reversion signals on the ratio itself

key_predictive_features.description: Silver's small market makes COT shifts of 10K-20K contracts extremely impactful. Net long >60K-70K = elevated speculative enthusiasm (contrarian sell). Near zero or net short = capitulation (contrarian buy). Commercial hedgers consistently position against extremes. Silver COT extremes produce sharper price reactions than gold.
key_predictive_features.our_coverage: cot_positioning.py re-enabled 2026-04-13 for shadow validation. Should promote to active once validation completes.

key_predictive_features.description: Silver PV demand declined 6% in 2025, forecast -19% in 2026 (to 151M oz) due to cost pressures. BUT: TOPCon/SHJ cells use 1.5-2x more silver per GW than PERC. Growing decoupling: installations up, silver per unit down. 5th consecutive supply deficit (40.3M oz in 2025). By 2030, supply may meet only 62-70% of demand.
key_predictive_features.our_coverage: Not tracked. Could add as macro fundamental indicator with quarterly update cadence.

key_predictive_features.description: Silver crashed from $121 to $70 in 2026 -- extreme volatility. High ATR periods correlate with momentum signal failure and mean-reversion signal success. Current post-crash ranging historically precedes renewed trending.
key_predictive_features.our_coverage: hurst_regime.py and volatility signal active. But regime state doesn't feed back into signal weighting (see quant research rec #2).

key_predictive_features.description: Strong inverse correlation with USD. dxy_cross_asset.py tracks this. In current tariff/trade war environment, DXY is less predictable, reducing signal reliability.
key_predictive_features.our_coverage: dxy_cross_asset.py active. Monitor accuracy given unusual DXY regime.

fundamental_drivers: Supply deficit: 5th consecutive year (40.3M oz in 2025), structural and growing
Industrial demand: 60% of total (solar, EVs, AI/electronics), but PV demand declining 19% in 2026
Price broke $100 for first time (Jan 2026), then crashed 42% to $70 -- volatile new territory
Gold-silver ratio compressed from 105 to ~50, silver less cheap relative to gold vs 2025
Central bank rate cut expectations support precious metals broadly
Tariff/trade war: safe haven demand boost but industrial demand headwind
Bank of America target $135-$309 based on ratio compression + industrial demand

cross_asset_correlations.XAU-USD: 0.85+ (ratio is key signal, not absolute correlation)
cross_asset_correlations.GVZ: -0.45 inverse (high gold vol = precious metals stress)

seasonal_patterns: Jan-Feb: historically strong (jewelry demand, Indian wedding season)
Mar-Apr: often corrective after Q1 rally (matching 2026 pattern)
Jul-Sep: Indian festival season demand (Dhanteras, Diwali)
COT weekly cycle: data Friday, market reacts Monday -- optimal signal timing

papers_and_models.title: Gold Silver Pair Trading - Mean Reversion Strategy Using Machine Learning
papers_and_models.key_finding: ML-filtered G/S ratio mean reversion: Sharpe 0.68-0.73, 20% drawdown reduction vs static stat arb

papers_and_models.title: Forecasting silver demand and supply by 2030
papers_and_models.key_finding: Supply may meet only 62-70% of demand by 2030; solar 29-41% of supply

papers_and_models.title: Silver: The Next Generation Metal (Silver Institute, Dec 2025)
papers_and_models.key_finding: Comprehensive supply-demand analysis showing structural deficit trajectory

recommended_new_signals.description: Gold-silver ratio z-score mean reversion. Rolling z-score (60d). BUY silver when z > 1.5 (silver cheap vs gold), SELL when z < -1.5. ML regime filter to avoid unstable spread conditions.
Enhanced COT: percentile ranking of managed money net positioning over 3-year rolling window. Extremes (>90th pct long or <10th pct) generate contrarian signals.
Quarterly macro indicator tracking supply-deficit trajectory. Bullish when deficit widening, bearish when narrowing.

deep_dives.implementation_notes: Silver at $81.44 with $120 target = 47% upside. The $121->$70 crash creates high-vol regime where mean-reversion should outperform momentum. G/S ratio at ~50 is near historical mean, so 'silver is cheap' thesis partially played out. Further upside requires gold rally (pulling ratio up) or silver-specific catalysts. 19% PV demand decline is a headwind not fully priced. Monitor COT: if managed money heavily long, contrarian signal flips bearish.

key_predictive_features.description: Identifies cycle peaks within 2 weeks historically. Dropped to 1.2 zone as of March 2026 (accumulation territory). Values >7 signal tops, <0 bottoms. 84.3% predictive accuracy for macro positioning.
key_predictive_features.our_coverage: onchain_data.py tracks via BGeometrics API (15/day limit). Active in on-chain signal. 12h cache.

key_predictive_features.description: Below 1.0 as of March 2026 -- coins moving at a loss (capitulation). Above 1.0 = profit-taking. Most precise on-chain thermometer for holder psychology.
key_predictive_features.our_coverage: onchain_data.py tracks SOPR. Active sub-metric with majority vote.

key_predictive_features.description: STH RP ~$89K (declining from $112K peak), LTH RP ~$39K. Bear markets end when STH RP < LTH RP. At $77K, BTC below STH RP but above LTH RP = mid-cycle correction, not full bear.
key_predictive_features.our_coverage: onchain_data.py may not distinguish STH vs LTH realized prices. If using aggregate MVRV only, missing this granularity.

key_predictive_features.description: Euphoria (>0.75) precedes tops. Below -0.1 = capitulation. Currently in anxiety/denial zone -- historically mid-correction, not cycle bottom.
key_predictive_features.our_coverage: onchain_data.py tracks NUPL via BGeometrics. Active sub-metric.

key_predictive_features.description: Declining exchange reserves = accumulation (coins to cold storage). As of March 2026, reserves declining. Combined with SOPR < 1.0 = capitulation-then-accumulation pattern.

Research: 82.44% directional accuracy combining on-chain + technical via CNN-LSTM. AI strategy with sentiment + blockchain: 1,640% return (2018-2024) vs 223% buy-and-hold. Temporal Fusion Transformers also promising.
key_predictive_features.our_coverage: We use separate on-chain and technical signals. meta_learner.py ingests signal votes as categorical features, not raw on-chain metrics. A dedicated CNN-LSTM on raw features would likely outperform.

fundamental_drivers: Below STH Realized Price ($89K) -- short-term holders underwater, accumulation zone
Halving April 2024 -- supply shock should drive through 2026
Tariff/trade war creating macro headwinds short-term
Fear & Greed at 21 (extreme fear) -- historically contrarian bullish
seasonal_patterns: Q4 historically strongest (year-end rally, institutional allocation)
Post-halving cycle: peaks 12-18 months after (Oct 2025 - Oct 2026)
Weekend vol often spills into Monday (24/7 trading)

papers_and_models.title: Bitcoin Price Forecasting 2026: Blending On-Chain Data with ML Models
papers_and_models.key_finding: CNN-LSTM on-chain + technical: 82.44% accuracy. 4-step workflow: macro positioning, ML directional probability, technical timing, confidence-scaled sizing

papers_and_models.title: Bitcoin On-Chain Bottom Signals March 2026
papers_and_models.key_finding: MVRV at 1.2, SOPR < 1.0, declining exchange reserves -- 3 of 7 metrics flashing accumulation

papers_and_models.title: Bitcoin STH/LTH Realized Price Crossover 2026
papers_and_models.key_finding: STH RP ~$89K declining, LTH RP ~$39K. Price between them = mid-cycle correction

recommended_new_signals.description: Track STH vs LTH realized prices independently. Signal regime: Price > STH RP = healthy bull; STH RP > Price > LTH RP = correction/accumulation (current); Price < LTH RP = deep bear. STH RP crossing below LTH RP marks cycle bottoms.
recommended_new_signals.data_requirements: STH/LTH realized prices from Glassnode or BGeometrics

recommended_new_signals.description: CNN-LSTM or TFT combining raw on-chain metrics (MVRV, SOPR, NUPL, exchange flows, STH/LTH) with technical indicators. Literature: 82% accuracy vs our ~50% on-chain signal.
recommended_new_signals.data_requirements: Raw on-chain time series (not just current readings)

recommended_new_signals.description: Rate of change of realized cap (aggregate cost basis). Rising gradient = new money at higher prices (bullish). Falling = distribution. More nuanced than MVRV ratio -- captures flow dynamics.
recommended_new_signals.data_requirements: Realized cap time series from BGeometrics

deep_dives.implementation_notes: BTC at $77,328 with $100K target = 29% upside. On-chain metrics (MVRV 1.2, SOPR < 1.0, declining exchange reserves) confirm accumulation zone. Risk: mid-cycle correction could extend to $56K-$70K before recovering. F&G at 21 is historically bullish but our F&G signal crashed to 25.9% accuracy -- extreme fear persisted too long for simple contrarian. STH RP at $89K is key resistance -- reclaiming confirms correction over. Below $70K challenges LTH profit levels. The on-chain composite ML approach (82% in literature) is most promising upgrade but requires significant ML infrastructure.
